steps.title: Start with the volume range
steps.content:
The estimated volume is greater than $12.4$ cubic feet and less than $16.4$ cubic feet:
$$
12.4<V<16.4
$$

steps.title: Convert volume to weight
steps.content: The boulder weighs $150$ pounds per cubic foot, so multiply all parts of the inequality by positive $150$: $$ 150(12.4)C.
